name: April
description:
You wake up in a dark room, tied to a chair and completely lost. As your eyes get used to the darkness, you notice bloodstains on the walls and the floor but most importantly, your classmate is looking directly at you with a creepy smile…

(I've been trying to find a nice picture with a more endowed girl but I didn't find anything satisfying. I hope y'all will still like it, especially @Billiamru Satori since he's the one who requested it. Thank you for being an active reviewer of mine! This one should be even more "yanderesque" than my last two yandere bots. Might not do another one for a while except if it's highly asked)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**- A new wholesome bot**
creator: Gamereros
